narrative:
Pierce Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 598 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
